news.title:
Nifty fell 490 points on Friday, ending at 22,800, marking its fifth straight weekly loss.
Weak global cues, rupee's record low, higher bond yields, and heavyweights RIL & HDFC Bank dragged markets.
news.summary:
Nifty fell 490 points on Friday, ending at 22,800, marking its fifth straight weekly loss.
Weak global cues, rupee's record low, higher bond yields, and heavyweights RIL & HDFC Bank dragged markets.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.

news.title: Bombay HC rejects plea for CBI probe into RIL, directors in KG basin case.
news.summary: Bombay HC rejects plea for CBI probe into RIL, directors in KG basin case.

news.title:
RIL shares dropped 4% due to new govt export duties on petrol and diesel, impacting revenues.
Brokerages like MOFSL and JM Financial maintain 'Buy' ratings, citing upside from high global fuel prices.
news.summary:
RIL shares dropped 4% due to new govt export duties on petrol and diesel, impacting revenues.

news.title:
Bombay High Court dismisses plea for CBI probe into alleged gas theft involving Reliance Industries.
The case pertains to claims of gas theft from ONGC fields linked to Mukesh Ambani.
news.summary:
Bombay High Court dismisses plea for CBI probe into alleged gas theft involving Reliance Industries.
The case pertains to claims of gas theft from ONGC fields linked to Mukesh Ambani.

Reliance has a target price of Rs 2,410, implying a 30.5% upside, backed by strong EV growth.

RIL denies claims of purchasing Iranian crude, calls reports baseless.
Company urges media to verify facts before publishing such news.

news.title:
Ambit downgrades IOC, BPCL, HPCL targets by up to 57%, citing risks from elevated oil prices, rupee depreciation, and insufficient government relief.
Ambit maintains Buy on RIL, ONGC, Oil India, and city gas distributors like GAIL; sees upstream oil and RIL as key winners amid high crude prices.
news.summary:
Ambit downgrades IOC, BPCL, HPCL targets by up to 57%, citing risks from elevated oil prices, rupee depreciation, and insufficient government relief.
Ambit maintains Buy on RIL, ONGC, Oil India, and city gas distributors like GAIL; sees upstream oil and RIL as key winners amid high crude prices.

news.title:
Early investors plan to offload 252M shares (2.8%) in Jio Platforms' $4B IPO.
The IPO is an OFS, enabling investor exits without raising fresh capital.
news.summary:
Early investors plan to offload 252M shares (2.8%) in Jio Platforms' $4B IPO.

news.title:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.
news.summary:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.

news.title:
Indian refiners, including IOC and RIL, use alternative currencies for Russian oil.
This shift reduces reliance on the US dollar amid geopolitical tensions and policy changes.
news.summary:
Indian refiners, including IOC and RIL, use alternative currencies for Russian oil.
This shift reduces reliance on the US dollar amid geopolitical tensions and policy changes.

news.title:
India VIX dropped to 24.5, signaling reduced market anxiety; Nifty 50 rose 2.3% to 23,444.75, and Sensex gained 2.2%.
Softened crude oil prices eased inflation concerns; HDFC Bank, Reliance, Bharti Airtel led Nifty 50 gains, with midcaps outperforming.
news.summary:
India VIX dropped to 24.5, signaling reduced market anxiety; Nifty 50 rose 2.3% to 23,444.75, and Sensex gained 2.2%.
Softened crude oil prices eased inflation concerns; HDFC Bank, Reliance, Bharti Airtel led Nifty 50 gains, with midcaps outperforming.
